storylets.title: {=floor_scout_return_numbers_confirmed_title}Numbers confirmed
storylets.setup: {=floor_scout_return_numbers_confirmed_setup}Scouts in: enemy numbers confirmed. Not as bad as feared. The sergeant repeats it twice so the lads can hear it and believe it.

storylets.title: {=floor_scout_return_road_clear_title}Road ahead clear
storylets.setup: {=floor_scout_return_road_clear_setup}Road clear ahead. Two days of easy marching. The scout says it flat, the way a man says it when he does not want to jinx it.

storylets.title: {=floor_scout_return_bridge_held_title}Bridge held
storylets.setup: {=floor_scout_return_bridge_held_setup}The bridge is held by ours. Good news for tomorrow. A picket on the bridge, a cook-fire behind him, and the river doing the rest of the work.

storylets.title: {=floor_scout_return_village_peaceful_title}Village untouched
storylets.setup: {=floor_scout_return_village_peaceful_setup}The village was untouched. Locals offer water. A child hands a dented cup up to a rider and does not ask for coin, and the rider pretends not to be moved.

storylets.title: {=floor_scout_return_tracks_stale_title}Stale tracks
storylets.setup: {=floor_scout_return_tracks_stale_setup}Tracks confirmed — two days old. Whoever it was is long gone. The scout prods the depression in the dirt with the tip of his boot and shrugs.
